title: Project Management Executive / Project Manager
description:
Role Overview
The Project Management Executive plays a key role in supporting the growth of YeahPay Singapore by coordinating cross-functional initiatives across merchant onboarding, payment system implementation, and partner integration. This role ensures that business, compliance, operational, and technical requirements are aligned to deliver seamless payment solutions in Singapore. You will also contribute to process optimisation, analytical support, and strategic projects that enhance the efficiency, scalability, and service quality of our payment ecosystem.

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and manage end-to-end merchant onboarding and partner integration projects.
  • Liaise with internal teams including Business, Operations, Compliance, Risk, and Product & Tech to align project requirements, timelines, and deliverables.
  • Support regulatory and compliance onboarding processes such as CDD, KYC, and risk assessment.
  • Manage project timelines, documentation, reporting, and stakeholder communication.
  • Assist with the optimisation of workflows, systems, and operational processes to enhance efficiency and scalability.
  • Support partner and agent enablement through onboarding guidance, training, and process coordination.
  • Contribute to cross-functional strategic initiatives, including special projects and ad hoc analysis for senior leadership.
  • Assist in developing dashboards, metrics tracking, and presentation materials to support business decision-making.

Requirements

  • 1-3 years of relevant experience in project management, business operations, payments, fintech, or related fields.
  • Highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple concurrent projects.
  • Adaptable to change, proactive, and capable of working in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
  • Strong team player with a client-focused mindset and the ability to collaborate across functions.
  • Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and familiarity with reporting or analysis tools is an advantage.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree, preferably in Business, Finance, Economics, Management, or a related discipline.
  • Existing network within merchants, banks, or payment service providers is highly desirable.

What We Offer

  • Competitive remuneration with performance-based incentives.
  • Opportunity to work within a fast-growing payments ecosystem.
  • Exposure to regional merchants and strategic partnerships.

If you’re passionate about shaping the future of the payments ecosystem and thrive in an environment that values creativity, agility, and impact, APPLY NOW to join our growing team in YeahPay Singapore!

postedCompany.description:
QFPay is a global mobile payment technology, service and solution provider based in Beijing, China. QFPay has been partnering with various mobile wallet providers including Alipay, WeChat Pay, China UnionPay, among others, servicing over 1 million+ merchants across Asia and executing over 500 million mobile payment transactions totaling USD30 billion+ in transaction value over the last 8 years. 

ABOUT THE FIRM We are one of the biggest mobile technology payment company in China, backed up by world class venture capital with more than 13 countries of business since we estabilished in 2011. 

Our objective is to support our Local Strategic Partner(s) to be the largest and the most dominant mobile banking and payment provider in their country and our aim is to provide mobile payment to both local market and inbound tourists. 

Our business model is to focus on the Merchant end - providing merchants with all-in-one mobile payment solutions and services including hardware, software, business and consumer driven data solutions, after sales support, merchant onboarding system etc. 

Our mobile payment technologies enable local Merchants to accept payments from users of local mobile wallets as well as Chinese + Asian tourists using their Chinese + Asian mobile wallets, allowing Merchants to accept payment from anyone, anytime, anywhere.
postedCompany.name: YEAHPAY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
